title: WBPSC Miscellaneous Services Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for BWO, Revenue Inspector and More Posts
total_vacancies: Assistant Child Development Project Officer, Disaster Management Officer, Block Youth Officer, Inspector Backward Classes Welfare, Assistant Agricultural Marketing Officer and many other posts
short_info: Public Service Commission, West Bengal (WBPSC) has published the Miscellaneous Services Recruitment Examination 2024 Detailed Advertisement (No. 13/2024). The recruitment drive aims to fill vacancies for various posts including Assistant Child Development Project Officer, Disaster Management Officer, Block Youth Officer, Inspector Backward Classes Welfare, and many other Group-B & Group-C equivalent posts under Government of West Bengal. Candidates aged 20-39 years as on 01.01.2024, with a Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University and ability to read, write & speak Bengali (except for Nep

application_fee.details: General / OBC: ₹160/- (plus service charges wherever applicable) SC / ST of West Bengal & PwBD (40% and above): Nil (exempted) Payment through online mode only. | No claim for refund of fee will be entertained.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India or such other nationals as declared eligible by the Govt. of India. | Essential Educational Qualification (as on closing date) | A degree from a recognized University or its equivalent. Ability to read, write and speak in Bengali (not required for candidates whose mother tongue is Nepali). Knowledge of Bengali will be tested at the time of Personality Test for candidates whose mother tongue is other than Bengali/Nepali. | N.B. : Candidates must fulfill the requisite qualifications by the closing date of submission of application. | Crucial date: 01.01.2024 | Not below 20 years but not more than 39 years (i.e., born not earlier than 02.01.1985 and not later than 01.01.2004). | Age Relaxation: | SC & ST of West Bengal: 5 years OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) of West Bengal: 3 years Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD): Up to 45 years No relaxation for SC/ST/OBC candidates of other States (treated as General) | N.B. : Age as recorded only in the Madhyamik or equivalent certificate will be accepted.

salary_details.details: Besides pay, the posts carry allowances as admissible as per ROPA, 2019.

selection_process: The examination will be held in three successive stages:
Preliminary Examination (Objective Type) – Screening Test only Final Examination (Conventional Type – Written) Personality Test

Final merit list will be prepared on the basis of marks obtained in Final Examination and Personality Test taken together. Preliminary marks will not be counted for final selection. Negative marking for wrong answers in Preliminary Examination. Qualifying marks in aggregate (Written + Personality Test): UR/EWS – 40%
how_to_apply: Fill details, upload photo, signature & required certificates
Edit window available from 22.05.2026 to 28.05.2026 (once only)
important_instructions: Read the detailed advertisement and Scheme & Syllabus carefully before applying. Applications once submitted are final. No request for change in category or details will be entertained after closing date. Mobile phones, smart watches or any communication device are strictly prohibited in the examination hall. Candidates must have good health and character. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. If at any stage a candidate is found ineligible or has submitted false information, his/her candidature will be cancelled.
